summary: Iteration 28 - SciPost Dimension Analysis improvements testing. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all new features working: Referee column in samples table, View LLM Prompts modal with dimension tabs, info tooltips on section headers, and 'Why papers repeat' explanation.

backend: Status has required fields (total_comparisons, ai_completed, ai_failed, ai_pending, by_dimension)
Results has 'prompts' field for View LLM Prompts feature
Prompts has 'template' key with full prompt structure
Prompts has 'dimension_tasks' for all 4 dimensions (validity, significance, originality, clarity)
Prompts has 'system' key with system prompt
Same paper appears with multiple referees (explains why papers repeat)
by_dimension has stats for all 4 dimensions with close_rate, mae, total
model_overall has per-model accuracy with close_rate and total
frontend: SciPost page loads with title 'SciPost Dimension Analysis'
Status cards show 206 Total Comparisons, 206 AI Completed
View LLM Prompts button visible and clickable
Sample Comparisons table visible with Referee column header
Referee values display in table rows (Referee_1, Referee_2)
'Why do papers repeat?' info text visible in samples header
'Agreement by Dimension' section visible with info icon
'Model Performance (All Dimensions)' section visible with info icon
Prompt modal opens with 4 dimension tabs (validity, significance, originality, clarity)
Prompt modal shows 'Full Prompt Sent to Model' section
Dimension tabs switch correctly when clicked
Modal closes properly with X button
Methodology section has 'Why papers repeat:' explanation
Info tooltip shows on hover over Agreement section (verified via screenshot)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend correctly returns 'prompts' field with template, dimension_tasks, and system keys
Samples include 'referee' and 'submission_id' fields as required
Frontend Tooltip component implemented correctly with hover-triggered visibility
PromptModal component properly displays all prompt details with switchable dimension tabs
data-testid attributes properly implemented for key elements (view-prompts-btn, prompt-tab-*, dim-card-*, sample-row-*, referee-*)
Methodology section updated with 'Why papers repeat' explanation
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing SciPost comparison data (206 comparisons across 4 dimensions)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified the SciPost Dimension Analysis improvements. The /api/scipost/results endpoint now returns: (1) 'prompts' field with template, dimension_tasks for all 4 dimensions, and system prompt; (2) samples include 'referee' and 'submission_id' fields. UI features verified: View LLM Prompts modal with dimension tabs, Referee column in samples table, info tooltips on section headers, 'Why papers repeat?' explanation. Currently 206 comparisons in database (may grow as background process is running).

referee_column.description: Referee column displays in Sample Comparisons table

view_llm_prompts.description: Button opens modal with dimension tabs showing prompts used

tooltips.description: Info tooltips on hover next to section headers

prompts_structure.dimension_tasks: Object with tasks for validity, significance, originality, clarity
prompts_structure.system: You are a scientific paper reviewer. Respond only with valid JSON.

methodology_explanation.description: Methodology section includes 'Why papers repeat' explanation
